title: Northern Ireland Construction Bulletin: 1st October to 31st December 2024
body: "This statistical bulletin provides users with the latest estimates of construction output carried out in Northern Ireland for Quarter 4 2024. It excludes work carried out by Northern Ireland Construction firms in other parts of the UK or elsewhere.  Revision Note: On 27 March 2025 the following correction was made to the NI Construction tables Q4 2024- Table 1.3 was updated to correct an error in the data. All other figures remain unaffected. "
